name: Google Hotels
description: Google service for searching, comparing and booking hotels, integrated into Google Travel since 2019.

years.notes: Google Hotel Ads mark — stylized red house silhouette with a 3x3 grid of windows in two tones (gold #F4B400 and light yellow #FFE168) plus dark-red accent windows. Used as the dedicated Google Hotel Ads / Hotel Center brand mark circa 2017-2022. Native viewBox '45 0 421.647 512' is non-square (taller than wide); transcribed verbatim and letterboxed to the 24x24 canvas via translate(2.1164 0) scale(0.046875) translate(-45 0).

Current Google Hotels surface mark — since the product was folded into Google Travel in 2019, the live page (https://www.google.com/travel/hotels) ships the Google Travel suitcase favicon as its product mark. Rounded-square body with the four-color Google quadrants (#EA4335 red, #FBBC04 yellow, #34A853 green, #4285F4 blue), darker blue handle and wheels (#1967D2), and the white Product Sans G centered on a blue circle. Native viewBox '95 0 320.808 512' is non-square; letterboxed to 24x24 via translate(4.4806 0) scale(0.046875) translate(-95 0).
